hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, subprocess
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
f = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', d.get('file_path', ''))
if f and f.endswith('.java') and 'generated' not in f:
    r = subprocess.run(['mvn', 'checkstyle:check', '-q'], capture_output=True, text=True)
    out = (r.stdout + r.stderr).strip()
    if out:
        lines = out.splitlines()
        print('\n'.join(lines[-20:]))
"

python3 -c "
import sys, json, subprocess
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
f = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', d.get('file_path', ''))
if f and f.endswith('.java') and 'generated' not in f:
    r = subprocess.run(['mvn', 'compile', '-q'], capture_output=True, text=True)
    out = (r.stdout + r.stderr).strip()
    if out:
        lines = out.splitlines()
        print('\n'.join(lines[-20:]))
"

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',d.get('file_path','')); banned='generated'; (sys.stderr.write('BLOCKED: Fern-generated code — do not edit manually\n'), sys.exit(2)) if banned in p and 'src/main/java/com/skyflow/generated' in p else sys.exit(0)"
osascript -e 'display notification "Claude finished" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null || true
